message:
The other day, I was scrolling through my phone and stumbled upon an article about home fire safety. It hit me how often I put off checking the smoke alarms or thinking about our escape plan. So, I decided to finally be the prepared one for once! I gathered the family and we tested the alarms (thankfully they all worked!) and mapped out our escape route. It felt good to be proactive instead of reactive. Plus, we even made it a fun little drill! 

It’s funny how something so simple can make you feel accomplished. Have you ever had a moment where you felt like you finally got it together in the safety department? This little refresher helped me a lot!
